measurements.noise_instrument_details: SRS SR865A lock-in amplifier operated in current mode.

measurements.source_location: PDF p. 4, Figure 2c; pp. 6-7 methods
measurements.amber_explanation: Noise was acquired using only an SRS SR865A lock-in amplifier, which warrants caution when comparing the reported detectivity with full-spectrum noise measurements.
measurements.curator_notes: Detectivity is reported at 10 V/µm with stabilized noise above 1 kHz; no applied voltage or single exact measurement frequency is provided.

measurements.noise_instrument_details: SRS SR850 lock-in amplifier.
measurements.source_location: PDF p. 4; Supplementary Figure 6f-i referenced in text
measurements.amber_explanation: Noise was acquired using only an SRS SR850 lock-in amplifier, which warrants caution when comparing the reported detectivity with full-spectrum noise measurements.
measurements.curator_notes: Measured room-temperature D* under reverse bias; numerical temperature and exact D* frequency are not stated.

measurements.noise_instrument_details: SRS SR850 lock-in amplifier.
measurements.source_location: PDF p. 4; Supplementary Figure 6f-i referenced in text
measurements.amber_explanation: Noise was acquired using only an SRS SR850 lock-in amplifier, which warrants caution when comparing the reported detectivity with full-spectrum noise measurements.
measurements.curator_notes: Measured room-temperature D* in the self-powered state; numerical temperature and exact D* frequency are not stated.

measurements.noise_instrument_details: D* uses a shot-noise approximation; measured-noise instrumentation is not applicable.
measurements.source_location: PDF p. 5, Figure 4b and accompanying text; p. 6 characterization methods
measurements.amber_explanation: Detectivity was calculated assuming that shot noise from the dark current dominates the total device noise.
measurements.curator_notes: Measured noise at 10 Hz was reported to saturate at the shot-noise limit but the published D* explicitly uses the shot-noise formula.

measurements.noise_instrument_details: Spectral analyzer; model not reported.

measurements.curator_notes: D* uses the measured noise current at 500 Hz and a 1 Hz noise-equivalent bandwidth.

paper.title: Shortwave Infrared Light Detection and Ranging Using Silver Telluride Quantum Dots
paper.notes: Ag2Te CQD SWIR photodiode and LiDAR demonstration.

paper.title: InAs Colloidal Quantum Dot Photodiode Stack for CMOS-Integrated Infrared Imaging
paper.notes: InAs CQD PIN photodiode stack designed for CMOS-integrated infrared imaging.

device.material_composition: InBr3-treated InAs CQDs with CuI and PTB7-Th hole-transport layers
device.device_stack: Si / TiN / a-IGZO / InBr3-treated InAs CQDs / CuI / PTB7-Th (~13 nm) / MoOx / ITO
device.device_notes: The 0.0625 cm2 area reported for transient testing is not assigned to the spectral D* measurement.

measurement.noise_instrument_details: Keysight E4727B Advanced Low-Frequency Noise Analyzer with a Keysight B1500 parameter analyzer.
measurement.source_location: PDF pp. 3-4, Figure 2e-f and Table 1
measurement.amber_explanation: The reported noise-acquisition chain includes a Keysight B1500 parameter analyzer, so the result is flagged for caution even though it is paired with a dedicated noise analyzer.
measurement.curator_notes: Maximum reported D*; the measured-noise result approaches 2.5e11 Jones at frequencies at or above 500 Hz.

paper.title: Surface-Reconstructed InAs Colloidal Nanorod Quantum Dots for Efficient Deep-Shortwave Infrared Emission and Photodetection
paper.journal: Journal of the American Chemical Society
paper.notes: InAs/ZnSe core-shell colloidal nanorod quantum-dot photodiode.

device.material_composition: EDT-exchanged InAs/ZnSe core-shell colloidal nanorod quantum dots
device.device_stack: ITO / ZnO / InAs-ZnSe CNQDs (~120 nm) / InAs CQD hole-transport layer / MoOx / Au
device.device_notes: The reported 10 mm2 active area was converted to 0.1 cm2.

measurement.noise_instrument_details: The supplied article refers to measured noise-current-density data in Figure S17 but does not identify the acquisition instrument.
measurement.noise_instrument_source: PDF p. 6, Figure 5c discussion and Supporting Information note
measurement.source_location: PDF p. 6, Figure 5a-c and accompanying text
measurement.curator_notes: Maximum reported D*; the peak wavelength is identified from the plotted spectral response. The response-time field records the reported fall time.

paper.title: Fast Near-Infrared Photodetection Using III-V Colloidal Quantum Dots
paper.notes: Fast InAs CQD near-infrared photodiode using InBr3 surface treatment.

device.material_composition: InBr3- and ammonium-acetate-treated InAs CQDs
device.device_stack: glass / ITO / ZnO / InAs CQDs (~120 nm) / MoO3 (10 nm) / Au (120 nm)
device.device_notes: The separate 2 ns response-time measurement used a smaller-area device and is not assigned to the D* record.

measurement.noise_instrument_details: Agilent N9010A signal analyzer with a FEMTO DHPCA-100 low-noise transimpedance preamplifier.
measurement.source_location: PDF pp. 5-6, Figure 4c-d and accompanying text; PDF p. 8 noise methods
measurement.curator_notes: Maximum reported D*; the separately reported 2 ns response at 850 nm is not transferred to this record.
